name: Audio overview — conversational podcast script from sources

setup.description: Two well-known HFrEF trials (DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced). User asks for a podcast-style audio overview. The AI must generate a Host/Expert conversation where every Expert claim is cited, all papers are covered, and no data is fabricated. Also tests that a plain comparison question is NOT routed to audio format.

papers.title: DAPA-HF: Dapagliflozin in Patients with Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction
EMPEROR-Reduced: Empagliflozin in Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction

mockChunks.text: Dapagliflozin reduced the composite of worsening heart failure or cardiovascular death (HR 0.74; 95% CI 0.65-0.85; P<0.001). The number needed to treat was 21 over a median follow-up of 18.2 months.
Enrolled patients were aged ≥18 years with NYHA class II-IV heart failure and LVEF ≤40%. Patients were randomized 1:1 to dapagliflozin 10mg or placebo.
A total of 4744 patients were enrolled at 410 sites in 20 countries. The median age was 66 years, 77% were male, and 42% had diabetes.
Empagliflozin reduced the composite of cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure (HR 0.75; 95% CI 0.65-0.86; P<0.001). The effect was consistent across prespecified subgroups.

3730 patients with class II-IV heart failure and LVEF ≤40% were randomized. Empagliflozin did NOT significantly reduce cardiovascular death alone (HR 0.92; P=0.23) or all-cause mortality (HR 0.92; P=0.22).
Patients were randomized to empagliflozin 10mg or placebo on top of recommended therapy. The median follow-up was 16 months.

queries.query: Generate an audio overview of these heart failure papers as a deep dive podcast
expectedBehavior: Contains Host and Expert dialogue markers
Expert cites sources with [N] in claims
Both DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced are discussed

queries.query: How do the primary endpoints compare between DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced?
expectedBehavior: NOT routed as audio overview — plain comparison question
failurePatterns: Generates audio script for a comparison question

qualityCriteria: Audio overview has clear Host/Expert dialogue structure
Every Expert claim has a citation [N]
Host only asks questions or summarizes — no unsupported claims
Both trials are covered in the conversation
Plain comparison question (q2) is NOT routed as audio overview
